name: Magikey Spirit - Vepartu
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鍵</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>憑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ウェパルトゥ
desc:
2 Level 4 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned: You can detach 1 material from this card; add 1 Level 4 or higher Normal Monster from your Deck or GY to your hand. If this card has a Normal Monster as material, it gains this effect.
● At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster with the same Attribute as a Normal Monster or "Magikey" monster in your GY: You can detach 1 material from this card; your opponent must send that monster to the GY.
mnst_eff:
2 Level 4 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned: You can detach 1 material from this card; add 1 Level 4 or higher Normal Monster from your Deck or GY to your hand. If this card has a Normal Monster as material, it gains this effect.
● At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster with the same Attribute as a Normal Monster or "Magikey" monster in your GY: You can detach 1 material from this card; your opponent must send that monster to the GY.
eff:
2 Level 4 monsters
If this card is Xyz Summoned: You can detach 1 material from this card; add 1 Level 4 or higher Normal Monster from your Deck or GY to your hand. If this card has a Normal Monster as material, it gains this effect.
● At the start of the Damage Step, if this card battles an opponent's monster with the same Attribute as a Normal Monster or "Magikey" monster in your GY: You can detach 1 material from this card; your opponent must send that monster to the GY.

action: Makes your opponent send from the field to the Graveyard
mst: Gains effects if specific Xyz Material is attached
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
